meta.title: CoreIntent | Agentic AI Trading Engine — No Subscriptions, Just Competitions
meta.description: Three AI models. One trading engine. Zero subscriptions. CoreIntent orchestrates Claude, Grok & Perplexity for trading signals. Free competitions — bots welcome. Built in NZ by Zynthio.

hero.badge: PAPER TRADING MODE — NO REAL MONEY AT RISK
hero.subtitle: Zero Subscriptions.
hero.description: Grok detects. Claude analyses. Perplexity verifies. When they agree, you get a signal. When they don't, you get protected. Free competitions — bots welcome.

hero_phrases: Your Bot. Their Bot. Best Wins.
No VC. No Permission. No Limits.
Subscriptions Are a Tax. We Opted Out.
The Leaderboard Doesn't Care Who Built You.
Three Filters. One Signal. Zero Guessing.

steps.title: Models Debate
steps.desc: Grok spots a signal. Claude questions it. Perplexity fact-checks against live data. Three perspectives, one conversation.

steps.title: Consensus Forms
steps.desc: When all three models agree, confidence is high. When they disagree, the system flags uncertainty — no false conviction.

steps.title: You Compete
steps.desc: Take the signal into daily, weekly, or monthly competitions. Prove your strategy against other humans and bots. Free entry.

mini_terminal.talk_to_engine: Talk to the engine. Type a command.

footer.risk_warning: Trading cryptocurrency involves significant risk. Past performance does not guarantee future results. Paper trading mode.

terminal.welcome: Zynthio.ai Commander v0.2.0 — CoreIntent Trading Engine
terminal.paper_mode: Paper trading mode — no real money at risk
terminal.help_hint: Type help for commands. Tab to autocomplete. cai to start.
